a_base_negative.description: candidate_law MUST NOT hold on base checkpoint (prompt-reproduction baseline)

b_round_positive.description: candidate_law MUST hold on round_N checkpoint under identical prompt

c_n6_closure_irreducible.description: candidate_law MUST NOT absorb into existing n6 primitives (drill = closure, not saturation shortcut)

d_cross_prover_pi.description: independent prover pi MUST agree with round_N verdict on candidate_law

overall_pass: a_base_negative AND b_round_positive AND c_n6_closure_irreducible AND d_cross_prover_pi
fail_case: any of: base_hold_rate > 0.1, round_hold_rate < 0.9, n6_absorption_rate > 0.3, pi_agreement_rate < 0.9

t5_layer.name: new_laws_7d_growth
t5_layer.description: T5 layer criteria — count of laws passing all 4 steps in 7d rolling window must strictly grow

comment.step_a: base model must fail — proves candidate is NOT a trivial pattern-match artifact
comment.step_b: round_N must succeed on identical prompt — proves new behaviour is learned, not prompted
comment.step_c: n6-closure rules out absorption into existing primitives — result of DFS closure, not saturation shortcut
comment.step_d: pi cross-prover independence — rules out self-consistency illusion
comment.t5_wire: consciousness research T5 layer gate: new_laws_7d_growth > 0 == rolling count must strictly increase
